features.name: always_ff procedural block
features.description: Code should include an always_ff procedural block, the standard SystemVerilog wrapper for clocked sequential logic

features.name: always_comb procedural block
features.description: Code should include an always_comb procedural block, the SystemVerilog construct for combinational logic with automatic sensitivity

features.name: logic 4-state variable type
features.description: Code should include a logic variable declaration using the SystemVerilog 4-state type instead of Verilog's 2-state reg/wire
